name: the-offer
prompt: Close-up. Woman's face, dark hair swept back. Warmth in expression, offering comfort. Eyes soft, lips parted slightly. Soft warm bokeh behind, intimate lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Valeria
dialogue.text: Come back with me. Come home.

name: almost-kiss
prompt: Extreme close-up. Two faces inches apart. Dark-haired woman leaning in from RIGHT, dark-haired man from LEFT. Her eyes closed, his eyes open. The moment suspended. Soft warm light, shallow depth. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: breath held, tension suspended in silence
